diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,153 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- Purpose: Main Hono entry point exporting the Hono class that extends HonoBase and sets up default routing with SmartRouter containing RegExpRouter and TrieRouter.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema.
+- Simple note: 34 lines total. Constructor accepts router option or uses default SmartRouter.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- Purpose: Base module for Hono containing the core Hono class implementation with request handling middleware composition and routing via the router instance.
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, compose, Context, METHOD_NAME_ALL, METHODS, Env, HandlerInterface, MergePath, mergePath, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, COMPOSED_HANDLER, HonoOptions, RouterRoute, GetPath, getPath, getPathNoStrict.
+- Simple note: 545 lines total. Implements request/response lifecycle, error handling, middleware composition, and route registration via #addRoute.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module index for PatternRouter exporting the PatternRouter class.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: 6 lines total. Simple re-export from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Pattern-based router that compiles routes into regular expressions for matching.
+- Names noticed: Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, emptyParams.
+- Simple note: 60 lines total. Routes are stored as [[pattern, method, handler]]. Patterns are converted to regex at add time. Matching iterates all routes and returns all matches.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module index for LinearRouter exporting the LinearRouter class.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: 6 lines total. Simple re-export from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Linear sequential router that stores routes as strings and checks them in order.
+- Names noticed: Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, emptyParams, ROUTES_LOOP.
+- Simple note: 144 lines total. Stores routes as [[method, path, handler]] arrays. Supports static paths, named parameters with :label, and wildcards. Throws UnsupportedPathError for multi-match ambiguity.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module index for RegExpRouter exporting the main router and PreparedRegExpRouter for serialization.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: 7 lines total. Re-exports router class and initialization utilities.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Compiles routes into a trie structure with regex patterns and static mappings for efficient matching.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, match, emptyParam, PATH_ERROR, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, Trie, buildInitParams.
+- Simple note: 252 lines total. Routes are stored during add phase using trie. Matching compiles matchers lazily. Supports full regex patterns with capture groups and param index tracking.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+
+- Purpose: Defines matcher types and provides the match function for runtime routing.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, match, emptyParam.
+- Simple note: 33 lines total. match() builds all matchers once, then uses static lookup or regex matching. Returns [[handlers, params], stash].
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Prepares RegExpRouter matchers upfront for faster runtime matching without lazy compilation.
+- Names noticed: Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, HandlerData, Matcher, MatcherMap, StaticMap, match, emptyParam, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, RelocateMap.
+- Simple note: 165 lines total. Constructor takes pre-built matchers and relocate map. add() uses relocate map to update internal state. Used with serialization for edge deployment.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie node implementation for building regex patterns from route paths.
+- Names noticed: ParamAssocArray, Node, Context, PATH_ERROR, Only_Wildcard_Exp, Label_Exp.
+- Simple note: 162 lines total. Node has children record and varIndex for params. insert() builds trie structure. buildRegExpStr() generates regex pattern.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie class for organizing routes and generating replacement map for param index tracking.
+- Names noticed: ParamAssocArray, Context, Node, ReplacementMap, PATH_ERROR.
+- Simple note: 74 lines total. insert() processes path string into tokens. buildRegExp() generates final regex with index and param replacement maps.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module index for SmartRouter exporting the SmartRouter class.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: 6 lines total. Simple re-export from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Router that adapts between multiple underlying routers dynamically during add/match time.
+- Names noticed: Result, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError.
+- Simple note: 70 lines total. Uses an array of routers and adds routes to them. On first successful match, fixes the active router and binds match method.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module index for TrieRouter exporting the TrieRouter class.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: 6 lines total. Simple re-export from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie-based router that builds a tree structure from path segments for exact and pattern matching.
+- Names noticed: Result, Router, checkOptionalParameter, Node.
+- Simple note: 28 lines total. checkOptionalParameter expands paths. insert() into node tree. match() traverses tree.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie node class storing methods, handler sets, patterns, and shared params for exact path matching with parameters.
+- Names noticed: Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingP
